messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: On it. MySQL: 'Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction'. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: kate_brennan
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: The idempotency lock (SELECT FOR UPDATE on idempotency_keys) is held while waiti.... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
